params.dropId: The ID of the drop to claim from

params.amountPerClaim: USDC amount each claimer receives (6 decimals)
params.expiresAt: Unix timestamp when the drop expires (0 = no expiry)
params.title: Human-readable name for the drop

checkClaimed(uint256,address).notice: Check if an address has claimed from a drop

claim(uint256).notice: Claim USDC from an active drop

createDrop(string,uint256,uint256,uint25.notice: Create a new USDC drop. Creator must approve this contract first.

refundRemaining(uint256).notice: Creator can refund remaining USDC after drop expires or closes early
